function.rulebook_notes: Followed lane rules: resolved identity in 10_entities/cast first, then used canonical identifier in project lane and read canonical project README.
function.outcome_justification: 10_entities/cast/elena.md identifies the CEO relationship and alias `elena`. Searching 40_projects for that identifier returned one canonical project record, and 40_projects/2026_03_25_dockflow_exception_radar/README.MD includes linked entity `entity.elena` with title `Dockflow Exception Radar`.
